MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
Off Calendar Nov-15-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONERS 3130 PACIFIC LLC, WILLIAM CAMPBELL, CHRISTOPHER VINCENT, and GUY VAILLANCOURT'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD is Granted. No opposition filed.
